title: If only Gendo left a picture
display_title: If only Gendo left a picture
wikitext:
[]: If only Gendo left a picture... Post by bladerj » Tue Aug 24, 2010 6:52 pm Imagine the mindfuck it would be to Shinji to see his mother badly injured in the first half of the movie !! And Knowing Rei must be a clone or his sister ?

[]: Post by Dirty Mick » Wed Aug 25, 2010 8:31 am I don't think Yui was ever "badly injured", more like "liquidated".

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Aug 25, 2010 1:44 pm Shinji would have a horrible PTSD trip whenever he saw orange drink.

[]: Post by skikes » Wed Aug 25, 2010 1:58 pm Have you ever met anyone who looked like someone you know and thought "they must be clones or long lost siblings!"?

[]: Post by Jinroh » Wed Aug 25, 2010 2:31 pm Dirty Mick wrote: I don't think Yui was ever "badly injured", more like "liquidated".

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Aug 25, 2010 3:42 pm

[]: Post by bladerj » Wed Aug 25, 2010 10:11 pm skikes wrote: Have you ever met anyone who looked like someone you know and thought "they must be clones or long lost siblings!"?

[]: The story of Shinji's life. Post by Killer Bee » Wed Aug 25, 2010 10:43 pm When was Yui badly injured? Also, I love the logic here: "My mother was involved in some freak accident, so Ayanami must be my sister. ASKFRHSGDHSGSJA FATHER!"

[]: Post by bladerj » Thu Aug 26, 2010 9:05 am JESUS ! I'M TALKING ABOUT FUCKING Rei !!! -Rei face looks the same as yui,so much Gendo even see a ghost of her in Rei -Shinji doesn't know his mother apearence as Gendo left no pictures of her. IF Gendo left picture of Yui, and Shinji had it, he would keep it fondly and vividly remember her face. so ,imagine the shock he would have while arriving at Nerv and seeing Rei, who looks exactly like his mother, all banged up being forced to pilot in his place. You get the logic now ? GODAMN IT

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 26, 2010 9:56 am I don't think this is going anywhere productive.
